entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A staple food crop in Africa whose production is threatened by soil waterlogging

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by a crop

entities.name: AVERAGE NUMBER OF LEAVES
entities.description: The mean count of leaves on a plant

entities.name: ROOT COLLAR DIAMETER
entities.description: The diameter of the plant stem at the soil surface

entities.name: YOUNG PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of a plant during its early growth stages

entities.name: NUMBER OF GRAINS PRODUCED
entities.description: The total count of grains harvested from a plant

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING DURATION
entities.description: The period during which the grain accumulates dry matter

entities.name: SEMI-CONTROLLED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An experimental setup used to evaluate the effects of soil water excess on maize

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate around a mean state

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The degree of heat in the atmosphere

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation falling on a given area

entities.name: EXTREME RAINFALL EVENTS
entities.description: Unusually heavy or intense precipitation events

entities.name: INTENSE RAINS
entities.description: High-intensity precipitation that can lead to soil saturation

entities.name: SOIL WATERLOGGING
entities.description: The saturation of soil with water, restricting oxygen availability to roots

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region of Africa south of the Sahara desert

entities.name: NORTHERN GHANA
entities.description: The northern region of Ghana where maize is cultivated

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The westernmost region of the African continent

entities.name: LOWLANDS
entities.description: Flood-prone areas often containing fertile soils

entities.name: BOLGATANGA
entities.description: A specific site in Northern Ghana used for the study

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: LAND PRESSURE
entities.description: The increasing demand for cultivable land

entities.name: FOOD INSECURITY
entities.description: The state of being without reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The period of growth in a plant before it begins to flower

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The period of growth in a plant involving flowering and seed production

entities.name: FLOWERING STAGE
entities.description: The specific phase of plant development when flowers open

entities.name: AFRICAN AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: The specific farming practices and structures used across Africa
